"healthcare"), describe what's distinctive about that domain's data that
the current `finance` / `sensor` presets don't handle well.
-->

## Proposed approach

<!--
How would this work? If you're proposing a new leakage or anomaly check,
include the statistical reasoning — what would the detection method be,
and why does it generalize beyond a single dataset? (See
`tsauditor/leakage/equivalence.py`'s docstring for the level of
justification this module expects — e.g. why AUC instead of Pearson for
binary targets.)
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Is there an existing library or technique that already does this?
If so, what does tsauditor need to do differently or better? -->

## Would you be able to implement this?

<!--
Not required — feature requests without an implementation are welcome too.
But if you're planning to open a PR for this, say so, since it helps avoid
duplicate work.
-->
